_comment: Template config — copy to config.json (gitignored) and fill in your keys.

hotkey._smart_threshold_hint: Smart mode: presses shorter than this are 'short taps' (enter sticky/toggle); longer presses act as push-to-talk.
hotkey._max_duration_hint: Safety stop for toggle / smart-sticky in ms (5min default). 0 disables. Esc always force-stops.

translate._comment: Translation mode. F8 by default; reuses ASR + context + LLM, swaps the prompt.
translate.smart_target_hint: Set true to auto-detect target from the focused window's content (experimental; may be wrong). Pin target_language for consistent behavior.
